title: Coze 2.5 introduces Workflow Templates
summary: Coze launched a Workflow Templates feature that lets users start from pre-built automation recipes and customize them.
evidence_spans: Workflow Templates are now available in Coze Studio
Choose from 30+ pre-built templates for customer support, lead routing, and content moderation

title: Coze introduces per-seat pricing for teams
summary: Coze moved from usage-based pricing to a per-seat model for the team tier.
evidence_spans: Team plan now starts at $20 per editor seat per month

title: Coze hires VP of Engineering for agent platform
summary: Coze is hiring a VP of Engineering to lead the agent platform group, signalling a major platform investment.
evidence_spans: We are hiring a VP of Engineering to lead our agent platform team
The role reports to the CTO and will own 60+ engineers

title: Coze announces partnership with enterprise CRM vendors
summary: Coze announced native integrations with Salesforce, HubSpot and Zoho for syncing agent actions to CRM records.
evidence_spans: Coze now ships native Salesforce, HubSpot and Zoho connectors
Updates from agents are written back to CRM records in near real-time

title: bytedance/coze GitHub repository becomes public
summary: ByteDance moved the coze open-source repository to public visibility with a permissive license.
evidence_spans: bytedance/coze is now public under Apache 2.0

title: FastGPT adds multi-modal RAG with image and audio ingestion
summary: FastGPT now supports ingesting images and audio files in addition to text documents for RAG pipelines.
evidence_spans: Multi-modal RAG is now generally available
Upload images and audio to a knowledge base alongside text documents

title: FastGPT 4.7 release adds workflow DAG editor
summary: FastGPT 4.7 ships a visual DAG editor for composing agent workflows.
evidence_spans: Drag-and-drop nodes for retrieval, tool calls and conditional branches

title: FastGPT publishes enterprise security whitepaper
summary: FastGPT published a SOC2 and ISO27001 readiness whitepaper targeted at enterprise buyers.
evidence_spans: Covers SOC2 Type II, ISO 27001 and GDPR data handling

title: FastGPT user feedback: long-context accuracy complaints
summary: Multiple users on the FastGPT forum report degraded answer accuracy when context length exceeds 60k tokens.
evidence_spans: When my knowledge base exceeds ~60k tokens, answers become unreliable
Anyone else seeing this with v4.6?
